## Summary of the Issue

relarey tested the VC transcription feature. It records human speech (via Whisper STT) and bot speech (via `logBotSpeech`), then compiles a .txt transcript when the last human leaves VC. The test revealed that **only bot messages appeared in the transcript, not human messages**.
